mapper.select:
SELECT s.id, s.name as text, s.name as label, s.id as value, s.id_company FROM site as s WHERE id IN ( SELECT id_site FROM site_employee_map WHERE id_employee = ${employee_id} )
AND id_company IN
#{compId}
AND s.`name` LIKE CONCAT("%",#{keyword}, "%")

SELECT c.id, c.name as text, c.id as value, c.name as label FROM company c WHERE id in ( SELECT id_company FROM site WHERE id IN ( SELECT id_site FROM site_employee_map WHERE id_employee = #{employee_id} ) )
AND c.`name` LIKE CONCAT("%",#{keyword}, "%")
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO api_access ( id_user, created_date, rate_limit, rate_limit_per_min, status, billing_date, next_billing_date, created_by, updated_by ) VALUES( #{employee_id}, now(), #{rate_limit}, #{rate_limit_per_min}, #{status}, #{billing_date}, #{next_billing_date}, #{author}, #{author} );
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() as id
mapper.select:
SELECT id, id_user, security_key, status, billing_date, next_billing_date, rate_limit, rate_limit_per_min FROM api_access WHERE id_user = #{employee_id}
AND status = 1
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO api_access_company_map (id_api_access, id_company, status) VALUES
( #{id}, #{item.id}, #{item.status} )

INSERT INTO api_access_site_map (id_api_access, id_site, status) VALUES
( #{id}, #{item.id}, #{item.status} )

INSERT INTO api_access_endpoint_map (id_api_access, id_end_point, status) VALUES
( #{id}, #{item.id}, #{item.status} )
mapper.select:
SELECT id, status, rate_limit, rate_limit_per_min, billing_date, next_billing_date, total_in_cycle, sites, companies, end_points, IFNULL(updated_date, '') as last_used, CASE WHEN updated_date IS NULL THEN 'never'
WHEN diff_minute < 60 THEN CONCAT(diff_minute, ' ', IF(diff_minute = 1, 'minute', 'minutes'), ' ago')
WHEN diff_hour < 24 THEN CONCAT(diff_hour, ' ', IF(diff_hour = 1, 'hour', 'hours'), ' ago')
WHEN diff_day < 30 THEN CONCAT(diff_day, ' ', IF(diff_day = 1, 'day', 'days'), ' ago')
ELSE CONCAT(diff_month, ' ', IF(diff_month = 1, 'month', 'months'), ' ago') END AS last_used_str FROM ( SELECT ac.id, ac.status, IFNULL(ac.rate_limit, 0) as rate_limit, IFNULL(ac.rate_limit_per_min, 0) as rate_limit_per_min, IFNULL(ac.billing_date, '') as billing_date, IFNULL(ac.next_billing_date, '') as next_billing_date, updated_date, TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, updated_date, NOW()) AS diff_minute, TIMESTAMPDIFF(HOUR, updated_date, NOW()) AS diff_hour, TIMESTAMPDIFF(DAY, updated_date, NOW()) AS diff_day, TIMESTAMPDIFF(MONTH, updated_date, NOW()) AS diff_month, ( SELECT JSON_ARRAYAGG( JSON_OBJECT( 'id', s.id, 'text', s.name, 'label', s.name, 'value', s.id, 'id_company', t.id_company, 'status', t.status ) ) FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT acs.id_site, acs.status, s.id_company FROM api_access_site_map acs INNER JOIN site s on s.id = acs.id_site WHERE acs.id_api_access = ac.id AND s.is_delete = 0 AND s.`status` = 1 ) t JOIN site s ON s.id = t.id_site ) AS sites, ( SELECT JSON_ARRAYAGG( JSON_OBJECT( 'id', c.id, 'text', c.name, 'label', c.name, 'value', c.id, 'status', t.status ) ) FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT acm.id_company, acm.status FROM api_access_company_map acm WHERE acm.id_api_access = ac.id ) t JOIN company c ON c.id = t.id_company ) AS companies, ( SELECT JSON_ARRAYAGG( JSON_OBJECT( 'id', ae.id, 'text', ae.name, 'label', ae.name, 'value', ae.id, 'status', t.status ) ) FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT ace.id_end_point, ace.status FROM api_access_endpoint_map ace WHERE ace.id_api_access = ac.id ) t JOIN api_endpoint ae ON ae.id = t.id_end_point ) AS end_points, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM api_usage au WHERE au.id_user = ac.id_user AND au.time BETWEEN ac.billing_date AND ac.next_billing_date ) AS total_in_cycle
FROM api_access ac
WHERE ac.id_user = #{employee_id}
) as sub

SELECT security_key, security_key_name, DATE_FORMAT(created_date, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS created_date, CASE WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, updated_date, NOW()) < 60 THEN CONCAT(TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, updated_date, NOW()), ' minutes ago')
WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(HOUR, updated_date, NOW()) < 24 THEN CONCAT(TIMESTAMPDIFF(HOUR, updated_date, NOW()), ' hours ago')
WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(DAY, updated_date, NOW()) < 30 THEN CONCAT(TIMESTAMPDIFF(DAY, updated_date, NOW()), ' days ago')
ELSE CONCAT(TIMESTAMPDIFF(MONTH, updated_date, NOW()), ' months ago') END AS last_used FROM api_access WHERE id_user = #{employee_id}

SELECT 'today' AS id, COUNT(*) AS value FROM api_usage WHERE id_user = #{employee_id} AND time >= CURDATE() AND time < CURDATE() + INTERVAL 1 DAY
UNION ALL
SELECT 'last_7_days' AS id, COUNT(*) AS value FROM api_usage WHERE id_user = #{employee_id} AND time >= CURDATE() - INTERVAL 6 DAY AND time < CURDATE() + INTERVAL 1 DAY
UNION ALL
SELECT 'this_month' AS id, COUNT(*) AS value FROM api_usage WHERE id_user = #{employee_id} AND time >= DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-01') AND time < DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE() + INTERVAL 1 MONTH, '%Y-%m-01')
UNION ALL
SELECT 'this_year' AS id, COUNT(*) AS value FROM api_usage WHERE id_user = #{employee_id} AND time >= DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-01-01') AND time < DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE() + INTERVAL 1 YEAR, '%Y-01-01');
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO api_usage (time, id_endpoint, id_user) SELECT UTC_TIMESTAMP() AS time, ep.id AS id_endpoint, ac.id_user FROM api_access ac JOIN api_access_endpoint_map aem ON aem.id_api_access = ac.id JOIN api_endpoint ep ON ep.id = aem.id_end_point WHERE ac.security_key = #{security_key} AND ac.status = 1 AND aem.status = 1 AND ep.route = #{route} AND ep.method = #{method} AND ep.is_active = 1 AND ep.is_delete = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE api_access SET updated_date = UTC_TIMESTAMP() WHERE security_key = #{security_key}
mapper.select: SELECT id, id_user, security_key, status, IFNULL(rate_limit, 0) as rate_limit, IFNULL(rate_limit_per_min, 0) as rate_limit_per_min, billing_date, next_billing_date FROM api_access WHERE security_key = #{security_key} AND status = 1 LIMIT 1

SELECT ( SELECT count(*) FROM api_access_endpoint_map ace INNER JOIN api_access ac on ac.id = ace.id_api_access INNER JOIN api_endpoint ap on ap.id = ace.id_end_point WHERE ac.security_key = #{security_key} AND ap.route = #{route} AND ap.method = #{method} AND ac.status = 1 AND ap.is_active = 1 AND ap.is_delete = 0 ) AS total_endpoint, ( SELECT count(*) FROM api_access_site_map acm INNER JOIN api_access ac ON ac.id = acm.id_api_access WHERE ac.security_key = #{security_key} AND ac.STATUS = 1 AND acm.STATUS = 1 ) AS total_site

SELECT acm.`status` FROM device d INNER JOIN api_access_site_map acm on acm.id_site = d.id_site INNER JOIN api_access ac on ac.id = acm.id_api_access WHERE d.id = #{device_id} and ac.security_key = #{security_key} and ac.`status` = 1

SELECT count(er.id_employee) FROM employee_role_map er INNER JOIN api_access ac on ac.id_user = er.id_employee INNER JOIN employee e on er.id_employee = e.id WHERE ac.security_key = #{security_key} AND ac.`status` = 1 AND er.id_role in (1,12,15) AND e.`status` = 1 AND e.is_delete = 0

SELECT 'total_users' as id, count( id ) AS value FROM api_access
UNION ALL
SELECT 'active_api_keys' as id, count( id ) as value FROM api_access WHERE status = 1
UNION ALL
SELECT 'total_api_calls' as id, count( id_endpoint ) as value FROM api_usage WHERE time >= DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m-01') AND time < DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH), '%Y-%m-01')

SELECT count(id) as totalRow FROM ( SELECT ac.id FROM api_access ac INNER JOIN employee e on e.id = ac.id_user INNER JOIN company c on c.id = e.id_company LEFT JOIN api_usage au on au.id_user = ac.id_user WHERE e.`status` = 1 AND e.is_delete = 0 AND c.`status` = 1 AND c.is_delete = 0
AND ( e.last_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR e.first_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR e.email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
GROUP BY ac.id_user ) as total
